# static/app/manifest.txt — assembly order for static/app.html.
#
# static/app.html is GENERATED: build.rs (via crates/app-html-assembler)
# concatenates the fragments below, in this order, into static/app.html.
# Edit the fragments, never the generated file. Blank lines and #-comments
# here are ignored. Every .css/.js/.html file in this directory must be
# listed exactly once — the assembler fails the build otherwise.
00-head.html
09-style-open.html

09-styles-fonts.css
10-styles-shell.css
11-styles-access-files.css
12-styles-tasks-log.css
13-styles-sessions-terminal.css
14-styles-displays-voice.css
16-styles-v2-tokens.css
ui2-chrome.css
ui2-voice.css
ui2-access.css
ui2-terminal-files.css
ui2-debug.css
ui2-station.css
ui2-vault.css
ui2-sessions.css
ui2-activity.css
ui2-agenda.css
ui2-memory.css
ui2-grid.css
ui2-live.css
ui2-usage.css
ui2-settings.css
ui2-composer-peek.css
ui2-target-switch.css
19-style-close.html

20-shell.html
21-access-dialogs.html
22-voice-bootstrap.html
23-voice-dialogs.html
ui2-shell.html

30-module-open.html
# 30-module-canary.js must stay the FIRST .js fragment and
# 59-module-alive.js the LAST (module-death canary pair — an uncaught
# top-level throw anywhere between them paints a fatal banner; see either
# file's header).
30-module-canary.js
31-ui2-foundation.js
ui2-chrome.js
ui2-voice.js
ui2-activity.js
31-init-identity-fleet.js
# 32-daemon-api.js must stay AFTER 31-init-identity-fleet.js (it reads the
# transport `let` bindings and peer registries declared there) and BEFORE
# every daemonApi consumer fragment (the F1+ family migrations start at
# 32-vault-custody.js and run through 55-files-ide.js).
32-daemon-api.js
32-vault-custody.js
33-station-core.js
34-station-panes.js
35-station-diff-viewer.js
36-voice-wasm-init.js
37-uicommand-changes-control.js
38-managed-context.js
39-session-windows.js

40-session-launch.js
41-session-window-actions.js
41b-reasoning-log.js
42-usage-terminal.js
42b-access-model.js
43-access-panes.js
44-shell-frames.js
# 45-display-viewer-core.js must stay BEFORE 45-displays-webrtc.js and
# 52-peer-display.js: both viewer classes' static initializers and policy
# objects read its top-level consts at class-evaluation time.
45-display-viewer-core.js
45-displays-webrtc.js
# 45b-cu-overlays.js must stay AFTER 45-displays-webrtc.js: it wraps the
# live workspace's retire hook and calls its noteCuDisplayActivity export.
45b-cu-overlays.js
46-recording-replay.js
47-annotation-clips.js
# Agenda must evaluate BEFORE the router (48): a #agenda deep link makes the
# router's eval-time boot call agendaOnTabShown(), which reads this fragment's
# module-level lets — they must be initialized by then (deep-link TDZ rule).
# Its own top level declares only lets/functions; daemonApi (32), routeTo (48),
# escapeHtml (52) are reached from inside functions at runtime.
ui2-agenda.js
# Memory: same deep-link TDZ rule as agenda — a #memory deep link makes the
# router's eval-time boot call memoryOnTabShown(), which reads this fragment's
# module-level lets. Top level declares only lets/functions.
ui2-memory.js
48-router-settings.js
48b-context-viz.js
49-daemons-multihost.js

50-control-transport.js
51-peer-approvals.js
51b-freshness-samplers.js
52-peer-display.js
53-stats-settings.js
ui2-settings.js
53-transfer-fsm.js
54-session-lifecycle.js
54b-transfers.js
55-files-ide.js
55b-session-launch.js
56-debug-sessions.js
57a-sessions-list.js
57b-session-fork.js
57-sessions-replay.js
57-sessions-message-search.js
57-attention-notifications.js
58-shortcuts-boot.js
58-display-request.js
# Composer satellites load LAST among features: they consume seams from
# 31 (sessionWindows), 39 (prompt-target resolver), 41 (focus/append) and
# ui2-chrome (dock state), and everything they do is boot-callback or
# event-driven — nothing at top level touches earlier fragments' consts.
ui2-composer-peek.js
ui2-target-switch.js
59-module-alive.js
59-module-close.html
